title: [ORIGINS] Dweller From the Deep
description: Adds the "Dweller From the Deep," a horror-themed Origin.
body:
Dweller From the Deep is a fast, lethal Origin that benefits most when in the hands of a ruthless player.

You can read Dweller From the Deep's powers below:

![Dweller From the Deep's powers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4cde6d4b1791a4ae93dc21bb01844f8ec03c4df.png)

If you play Dweller From the Deep on 1.20.1, only Origins 1.10.1 or higher will work. Please refrain from using an older version.
